title: Access control and state mutability: modifiers and public variables
scope: Files: stack_wbnb.sol, proxy_wbnb.sol (modifiers, public variables, constructor initialisation)
what_to_reason: Whether privileged operations exist and if access control is enforced
Whether public state variables leak sensitive info or allow manipulation
Constructor initialization correctness and ownership assumptions
how_to_reason: Search the codebase for admin-only functions or upgrade hooks (none expected)
Review modifiers to ensure they check the correct conditions
Verify public variables like tokenAddress, stackAddress and whether they can be changed
edge_cases: Missing owner/ownerless contracts where admin functions are needed
Uninitialized addresses leading to accidental calls to zero address
